_source_text:
MANHATTAN COMMUNITY BOARD 7
Land Use Committee Meeting
Monday, April 8, 2024, 6:30 PM
250 West 87th Street, New York, NY 10024

AGENDA

Item 1. ULURP No. N 240156 ZRM — Zoning Text Amendment

The Department of City Planning seeks authorization for a zoning text amendment affecting special regulations for ground-floor retail uses on the Upper West Side. ULURP No. N 240156 ZRM would modify Appendix F of the Zoning Resolution to update the list of street frontages subject to mandatory retail requirements.

This is an application by the City of New York; no specific property address applies. Written comments are due by April 22, 2024.
title: ULURP N 240156 ZRM — Zoning Text Amendment, Upper West Side retail frontages
summary: Community Board 7 (Manhattan) to hear a DCP zoning text amendment modifying mandatory ground-floor retail frontage requirements on the Upper West Side.
